title: Unknown Server 0
description: A simple, optimized modpack designed around exploration, automation or building.
body:
## About the modpack

A (different than my other) modpack containing many mods, designed around automation, exploration or building(or whatever you want). Contains many mods like Create(and some of its addons), Regions Unexplored, BetterEnd, Naturalist and more. After heavy optimization and mod removing, the modpack is now optimized for weaker computers.

## Links

[Just Enough Resurces - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer)

[Just Enough Resources - CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer)

## Versions:

Minecraft version: 1.20.1

Mod loaders: Quilt(discontinued), Fabric

### Warning
For the modpack to work server side, you **_may_** have to remove the client side only mods, or the server **_might_** crash
